}$00,$00,$00,$01,$0b,$0b,$01,$0a,$01,$09,$0d,$0d,$09,$01,$00,$00,{

'Sprites14_Pokemon3 Colors
Sprites14_Pokemon3Colors long {
}%00000000_00000000_00000000_00000000,{   'index=0x0
}%11111111_00000000_00000000_00000000,{   'index=0x1
}%11111111_11111000_11110000_00000000,{   'index=0x2
}%11111111_11011000_10110000_00000000,{   'index=0x3
}%11111111_10100000_01101000_00000000,{   'index=0x4
}%11111111_11110000_11110000_11110000,{   'index=0x5
}%11111111_11010000_00111000_00000000,{   'index=0x6
}%11111111_11111000_10000000_01011000,{   'index=0x7
}%11111111_10011000_00000000_00000000,{   'index=0x8
}%11111111_10000000_10011000_11111000,{   'index=0x9
}%11111111_11111000_11111000_11111000,{   'index=0xa
}%11111111_01010000_01100000_10110000,{   'index=0xb
}%11111111_01110000_00111000_00000000,{   'index=0xc
}%11111111_10110000_11001000_11111000,{   'index=0xd
}%11111111_11011000_01110000_00011000,{   'index=0xe
}%11111111_11111000_10010000_01000000,{   'index=0xf
}%11111111_10101000_01100000_00011000,{   'index=0x10
}%11111111_10110000_10111000_11000000,{   'index=0x11
}%11111111_11011000_10101000_01100000,{   'index=0x12
}%11111111_11111000_11100000_10011000   'index=0x13
